name: @radzor/audio-capture
description: Capture audio from the user's microphone using the Web Audio API and getUserMedia. Provides a real-time audio stream suitable for speech recognition, voice chat, or recording.

inputs.name: channels
inputs.description: Number of audio channels (1 = mono, 2 = stereo).

inputs.name: codec
inputs.description: Audio codec to use for encoding (opus, pcm, aac).

outputs.name: audioStream
outputs.description: Raw PCM audio stream from the microphone.

outputs.name: audioBlob
outputs.description: Recorded audio as a Blob after stopRecording() is called.

events.name: onSpeechStart
events.description: Fired when voice activity is detected in the audio stream.

events.name: onSpeechEnd
events.description: Fired when a speech segment ends (silence detected).

events.name: onError
events.description: Fired when an error occurs (permission denied, device unavailable, etc.).

actions.name: startRecording
actions.description: Request microphone permission and begin capturing audio.

actions.name: stopRecording
actions.description: Stop capturing and return the recorded audio as a Blob.

actions.name: pause
actions.description: Pause the current recording without releasing the microphone.

actions.name: getVolume
actions.description: Get the current input volume level (0.0 to 1.0).

llm.constraints: Browser environment only. Requires HTTPS for getUserMedia. User must grant microphone permission.
